message:
🌱 Phase 3a container-query rollout: SkeletonStats + flex-wrap in 32 CNCF status cards (#10520)

- Convert 26 SkeletonStats grid-cols-4 → grid-cols-2 @md:grid-cols-4
  so loading skeletons match the responsive live stat grids (Phase 2)
- Add flex-wrap to 27 unwrapped flex justify-between control bars
  in nats, openyurt, cloud_custodian, rook, contour, otel, harbor
- Convert 2 fixed grid-cols-3 → grid-cols-2 @sm:grid-cols-3
  in volcano_status and dapr_status

Continues the container-query rollout from #8695 RFC (Phase 3a).
Pure CSS class changes — no logic or behavior changes.

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
